name: Wall Mounted Drying Rack White - Brightroom™: Folding Pull-Out Steel, 36.42" Height, 10lb Capacity, Adult Assembly Required
description:
With the Wall-Mounted Drying Rack from Brightroom™, it's easy to add extra hanging space for air-drying laundry in your home. This easy-to-open, wall-mounted drying rack instantly adds more space in your laundry room or elsewhere for hanging your clothes, linens and more to dry, while its convenient space-saving construction allows it to fold up flat against the wall when not in use. Rust-resistant carbon steel and rubberwood materials provide a stylish and practical design, while a 25.2-inch by 36.42-inch side adds plenty of space for air-drying a variety of garments.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.
